brief_justification: Agent provides numeric answers (106 cycles, ~1005.9 hours) which do not match the ground truth 'No'; Agent traces first-order degradation compounding, second-order cumulative effect, and contrasts naive vs. actual estimates across three levels; Agent explicitly checks boundary conditions at n=105 and n=106 but does not name any reasoning biases or reflect on methodology choices; Agent performs explicit boundary verification and cross-checks with a naive estimate as a sanity check; Agent uses approximation symbols and notes the gap vs. naive estimate but does not flag assumptions (e.g., constant current draw, no partial cycles) as uncertainties; Agent considers only the geometric-series approach with no alternative derivation or model examined; Every formula, substitution, and arithmetic step is shown explicitly with enough detail for full reproduction by a third party.
